request_payload.exposure_text: As a cybersecurity expert who's worked with NATO allies, I've seen firsthand how our reliance on foreign tech leaves us vulnerable. The recent attacks on our critical infrastructure weren't just isolated incidents - they're part of a pattern. We need to invest in domestic strategic autonomy now, before it's too late. The alternative? Imagine your local hospital's systems locked down during a crisis. We can't afford to wait while others make these decisions for us. #CyberSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
